# Principles and Methods of Meta-Analysis

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Formulating the research question

_To be added._

## Writing a meta-analysis protocol

_To be added._

## Searching the literature

_To be added._

## Study selection

_To be added._

## Quality assessment

_To be added._

## Data extraction

_To be added._

## Data analysis

_To be added._

## Reporting a meta-analysis

_To be added._
